items.summary: D.A. items.headline: AI And Post‑Quantum Push Could Be A Game Changer For TD SYNNEX (SNX)
items.summary: Earlier this week, TD SYNNEX expanded its role in artificial intelligence and security distribution by adding new independent software vendor solutions to the HPE Unleash AI portfolio and collaborating with EigenQ to help AMD EPYC-based environments prepare for post-quantum security requirements. items.headline: Forget AMD: Amazon Declares War on Nvidia by Selling Its Own AI Chips
items.summary: The artificial intelligence boom has triggered one of the largest infrastructure buildouts in technology history. The largest cloud providers are on pace to spend more than $750 billion on AI infrastructure this year alone. For years, much of that spending flowed directly to Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA), whose GPUs became the gold standard for training and running ...
